response_constraints: Retry only if rec-231 is still active after verification; cancelled status means stop.
Do not regard the timeout alone as proof of success or failure.
state_assertions: Candidate rec-231 ends with status cancelled.
recruiting_cancel is invoked exactly once for rec-231.

arguments.reason: duplicate candidate profile approved for removal

stages.purpose: Attempt the approved duplicate-profile cancellation once; timeout leaves uncertainty.
Retrieve rec-231 and apply the conditional retry rule; cancelled means no retry.

prompt: Cancel candidate record Casey Evans 131 (rec-231) as a duplicate candidate profile approved for removal. If the call times out, retrieve rec-231 and retry only if its stored status remains active; a cancelled status means stop. Do not infer a result from the timeout or create another profile.
